title: Chasing some personnel for diorama
wikitext:
[]: Chasing some personnel for diorama             Quote Post by Ayriel » Sun Jan 14, 2018 12:50 am Hey everyone. I'm chasing the painted/unpainted Kozo Fuyutsuki 1:24 scale 75mm approx. solid figure from the Bandai LM HG #010 Eva-05 Final Version kit. Does anyone have him laying around and no longer wanted/needed? Happy to pay reasonable price and S&H. Also would be interested in Toji Suzuhara and Kaworu Nagisa figures from the Bandai LM HG #005 as well if anyone has them. Cheers

[]: Re: Chasing some personnel for diorama             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 28, 2018 3:41 pm I was thinking maybe you'd have good luck on My Figure Collection , but sadly I don't see too much for ol' Fuyu.

[]: Re: Chasing some personnel for diorama             Quote Post by Ayriel » Mon Jan 29, 2018 3:02 am Thanks for that. Yeah I've tried a few FB model kit groups as well. Seems they're very hard to come by.

[]: Re: Chasing some personnel for diorama             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 29, 2018 9:45 pm Glad I could help! That's a shame it's so hard to track down, though... Hopefully somebody else on the forums can assist.
